hypothesis: Making each declared placeholder visible in projected training prompts closes the E500 train/eval slot-authority mismatch without relaxing data gates.

invalid_attempts.reason: The isolated clone lacked OpenUI bridge dependencies, so all 270 candidates failed closed at G2. This build is local only, was not published, and is not evidence.

feedback_action.recommendation: programspec_generated yield is 0.375 because semantic dedup removed near-duplicate variants
feedback_action.decision: Keep the unchanged semantic dedup gate. Record the emitted producer-yield candidate for a future matched synthesis experiment; do not add no-op variants or relax the threshold.

decision: Publish E521 as the matched visible-inventory candidate for bounded continuation training. This is data-quality evidence only; it makes no model-quality or ship claim.
